questionHtml:
Two people need to carry a pole of length 11.25 m from the passageway into the room. It must be carried horizontally.

Determine whether this is possible, giving a reason for your answer.
markschemeHtml:
(11.25=)1594>1554 (or equivalent comparative reasoning)          R1

the pole cannot be carried (horizontally from the passageway into the room)          A1

 

Note: Do not award R0A1.

 

[2 marks]

meta.title: Determine whether this is possible, giving a reason for your answer.
